title: 36   Laboratory Manual 3. Draw two lines, one joining 0º-180º line and another 90º-270º line,
subject: Mathematics
unit: Unit L - the other end to move freely along the circle
activityTitle: 36   Laboratory Manual 3. Draw two lines, one joining 0º-180º line and another 90º-270º line,
objective:
To plot the graphs of sin   x , sin 2 x ,
2sin x   and sin   2
x   , using same
coordinate axes.
Plyboard, squared paper, adhesive,
ruler, coloured pens, eraser.
procedure:
1. Take a plywood of size 30 cm × 30 cm.
2. On the plywood, paste a thick graph paper of size 25 cm × 25 cm.
3. Draw two mutually perpendicular lines on the squared paper, and take them
as coordinate axes.
4. Graduate the two axes as shown in the Fig. 10.
5. Prepare the table of ordered pairs for sin   x , sin 2 x , 2sin   x   and sin   2
x   for

observation:
1. When radius line of circular plate is at 0º indicating the point A (1,0),
cos 0   =   ______ and sin 0 = _______.
2. When radius line of circular plate is at 90º indicating the point B (0, 1),
π   π

cos   π   = ______ and sin   π   = _________.

which means   3 π   3 π
